subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of Jinab-i-'Andalib - upon him be the Most Glorious Glory of God - hath been received and hearkened unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب عندلیب علیه بهاء الله الاعلی بحضور و اصغا و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
